recommendations.product_name: Dyson V15 Detect Cordless Stick Vacuum

recommendations.product_name: Shark PowerDetect (PowerDetect Cordless / PowerDetect 2-in-1 Robot family)
pros: Strong suction and smart floor detection
Available with auto-empty / NeverTouch bases (robot and stick variants)
cons: Software/navigation issues reported for some robot models
Can be heavy in upright variants

recommendations.product_name: Miele Complete C3 Marin Canister Vacuum
pros: Quiet operation; excellent for allergies/pet hair
cons: Some users prefer buying through local dealers for service
